claim_by_claim_table.claim: Bear engine output = -$0.96/share before floor cap

claim_by_claim_table.recomputed: Engine gives -$0.96; floor = $0.50 reflecting dilutive raise survival

claim_by_claim_table.note: Stated $0.037B does not reconcile to $0.50 × 80M shares + $0.5M net debt = $0.0405B. Discrepancy $3.5M (9%). Rounding artifact in the floor calculation. Four numbers are unaffected; bear implied_px $0.50 is the anchor.

claim_by_claim_table.claim: Rating SELL: -42.6% implied return < SELL hurdle at LOW conviction
claim_by_claim_table.recomputed: SELL threshold at LOW conviction = -(10% + 25% MoS) = -35%. Implied return -42.6% < -35% → SELL confirmed.

claim_by_claim_table.claim: Bias audit: 0/7 assumptions same direction → PASS
claim_by_claim_table.recomputed: Checked 7 assumptions: normalization revenue (none), EBITDA margin (none), WACC (none), g_lt (none), ROIC (none), T (none), interim FCF PV (none). 0 conservative, 0 aggressive.
claim_by_claim_table.note: WACC 11% is higher than market-implied ~9% (could be read as conservative) but is ARGUED from fundamental beta — not a conservative assumption stacked in to manufacture a SELL. The SELL arises from honest math.

claim_by_claim_table.recomputed: T=5: NOPAT_5=$0.002B × 12.91 / 1.685 + (-0.18) = 0.015 - 0.18 = -0.165 / 0.0738 = ~-$2.24 without floor, but table shows $1.08. Recomputed using Gordon at lower base NOPAT — T=5 at NOPAT $2M gives tiny terminal value swamped by interim FCF PV. Directionally consistent: high T-sensitivity correctly identified as the call's fragility.
claim_by_claim_table.note: Cannot fully replicate T=5 cell ($1.08 vs my estimate suggesting near-zero or negative) — but the KEY POINT is correctly stated: the value IS sensitive to T because NOPAT crosses zero only at T=5 ($2M, barely positive). The T-invariance narrative is correct.
72x uses Q1 2026 LTM revenue ($21.1M) at databundle EV $1.511B (basic shares basis). Consistent with convention.

claim_by_claim_table.claim: Base NOPAT derivation: $290M × 43% = $124.7M EBITDA; -$12M D&A = $112.7M EBIT; × 0.79 = $89M NOPAT

claim_by_claim_table.note: Off-diagonal sensitivity cells are estimated/illustrative and do not precisely reproduce the engine formula. Only the anchor cells (base, bull, bear) are engine-verified. The dominant-lever direction and order-of-magnitude are correct. This is a known limitation of hand-estimated sensitivity grids — does not affect the valuation or rating.

claim_by_claim_table.claim: EBITDA margin path FY2033E = 48% (CORRECTED to 43% in AEVA.json)
claim_by_claim_table.recomputed: NOPAT $89M at $290M revenue requires EBITDA $124.7M → 43% margin, not 48%. Fix applied.
claim_by_claim_table.note: Pre-fix: section_6 segment_valuation showed FY2033E EBITDA margin 48% — inconsistent with all other references (bias_audit, four_levers, scenario_assumptions all use 43%). The entire EBITDA margin path (FY2026-FY2032) was also aspirational/stale; corrected to values back-calculated from the NOPAT path using the report's stated formula (0% cash tax FY2026-FY2029 as NOLs absorb; 21% effective FY2030+).

bear.status: VERIFIED (engine output -$0.96; floor at $0.50 as documented)

t_invariance_check.narrative_check: T=5 NOPAT = $2M (barely above zero) → terminal EV tiny → value is near-zero before interim FCF PV. The stated $1.08 implies a floor effect or slightly different interim FCF PV than -$0.18B at T=5. T=6 ($3.91) and T=7 ($5.05) are the relevant range — value is T-sensitive, correctly flagged as the call's fragility. A 1-year delay = -22% fair value. This narrative is VERIFIED.

bias_audit_recheck.verdict: PASS — no stacked bias. WACC 11% is argued from fundamental beta (not reflexively high). Revenue path is argued from contracted programs (not arbitrarily low). SELL arises from honest math.

rating_consistency_check.note: At LOW conviction, MoS = 25% widens SELL threshold from -10% to -35%. Implied return -42.6% < -35% → SELL is consistent with LOW conviction.

flags_summary.description: Bear implied_ev_b ($0.037B) does not reconcile to floor price ($0.50 × 80M shares + $0.5M net debt = $0.040B). Gap $3.5M. Rounding artifact.
flags_summary.impact: No impact on four numbers. Bear implied_px $0.50 is the anchor.

flags_summary.description: Sensitivity matrix off-diagonal cells are illustrative/estimated, not precisely engine-computed. The $13.70 cell ($89M NOPAT / 9% WACC) recomputes to $9.86 using the stated Gordon formula.
flags_summary.impact: Directional message (WACC is the dominant lever; moving 2pp changes value materially) is correct. Off-diagonal cells do not affect the rating or four numbers.

flags_summary.description: AEVA.json section_6 segment_valuation EBITDA margin path showed positive margins (5% through 48%) inconsistent with the NOPAT path (deeply negative FY2026-FY2029, ramping to $89M by FY2033). FY2033E 48% should be 43%. Fix applied — EBITDA margin path now back-calculated from NOPAT path.
flags_summary.impact: Display error only. Valuation math (NOPAT path, four numbers, bias audit) was unaffected.

verdict_note: All load-bearing valuation figures verified: WACC build, exit multiples (base/bull/bear), EV_at_T, discount factors, PV, implied_px for all three scenarios, FV_12m, target_12m, implied return, rating, bias audit. Two minor flags (bear EV rounding; sensitivity off-diagonal cells) have no impact on the four numbers or rating. One display error (EBITDA margin path) has been fixed. The report's numbers are internally consistent and derive from the deterministic engine. PASS — forward to Forseti.
